title: IQM, a Global Leader for Quantum Computing, to Become the First Listed European Quantum Company, Through Merger with Real Asset Acquisition Corp. - IQM Quantum Computers
why:
- IQM will become the first listed European quantum company through a merger, valued at approximately USD 1.8 billion.
- IQM is a global commercial leader with 21 quantum systems sold to 13 customers, including 4 out of the top 10 supercomputing centres globally.
- The company has delivered 15 systems, built over 30 quantum computers, has its own chip factory and quantum data centre, and operates a vertically integrated business model.
- IQM's quantum processors have achieved greater than 99.9% fidelity for single-qubit and two-qubit gates and readouts.
- Following the transaction, IQM’s cash position is expected to exceed USD 450 million, supporting further advances in quantum technology and commercialization.
- IQM has strong commercial integrations with major high-performance computing and enterprise platforms including NVIDIA, Hewlett Packard Enterprise, AWS, Toyo Corporation, and Bechtle AG.
